features.name: Rage
features.description: Bonus action: bonus melee damage, advantage on STR checks/saves, resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing.

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.description: While unarmored, AC = 10 + DEX mod + CON mod.

features.name: Reckless Attack
features.description: Gain advantage on STR melee attacks; attacks against you gain advantage until your next turn.

features.name: Danger Sense
features.description: Advantage on DEX saves against effects you can see.

features.name: Primal Path
features.description: Choose your barbarian subclass.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

features.name: Fast Movement
features.description: +10 ft speed while not in heavy armor.

features.name: Feral Instinct
features.description: Advantage on initiative.

features.name: Brutal Critical
features.description: Roll extra weapon damage dice on a critical hit.

features.name: Relentless Rage
features.description: Drop to 1 HP instead of 0 with a CON save while raging.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Cast bard spells using Charisma.

features.name: Bardic Inspiration
features.description: Bonus action: give a creature a d6 to add to a roll (scales with level).

features.name: Jack of All Trades
features.description: Add half proficiency to checks you aren't proficient in.

features.name: Song of Rest
features.description: Allies regain extra HP on a short rest.

features.name: Bard College
features.description: Choose your subclass.

features.name: Expertise
features.description: Double proficiency on two chosen skills.

features.name: Font of Inspiration
features.description: Regain Bardic Inspiration on a short or long rest.

features.name: Countercharm
features.description: Performance grants allies advantage vs frightened/charmed.

features.name: Magical Secrets
features.description: Learn spells from any class's list.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Cast cleric spells using Wisdom.

features.name: Divine Domain
features.description: Choose your domain; grants extra spells and features.

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: Turn Undead plus a domain option (recharge on rest).

features.name: Destroy Undead
features.description: Channel Divinity can destroy low-CR undead.

features.name: Divine Intervention
features.description: Call on your deity for aid.

features.name: Druidic
features.description: You know the secret druid language.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Cast druid spells using Wisdom.

features.name: Wild Shape
features.description: Transform into beasts you've seen (limits by level).

features.name: Druid Circle
features.description: Choose your subclass.

features.name: Beast Spells
features.description: Cast with verbal/somatic components while in Wild Shape.

features.name: Archdruid
features.description: Unlimited Wild Shape uses.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: Adopt a combat specialty (e.g. Defense, Dueling, Archery).

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: Bonus action: regain 1d10 + level HP (once per rest).

features.name: Action Surge
features.description: Take one additional action on your turn (once per rest).

features.name: Martial Archetype
features.description: Choose your subclass.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

features.name: Indomitable
features.description: Reroll a failed saving throw (once per rest).

features.name: Extra Attack (2)
features.description: Attack three times when you take the Attack action.

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.description: While unarmored, AC = 10 + DEX mod + WIS mod.

features.name: Martial Arts
features.description: Use DEX for unarmed strikes; bonus unarmed strike.

features.name: Ki
features.description: Spend ki points on Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, Step of the Wind.

features.name: Unarmored Movement
features.description: +10 ft speed while unarmored (scales).

features.name: Monastic Tradition
features.description: Choose your subclass; Deflect Missiles.

features.name: Slow Fall
features.description: Reduce falling damage as a reaction.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice; Stunning Strike with ki.

features.name: Evasion
features.description: Take no damage on a successful DEX save (half on fail).

features.name: Divine Sense
features.description: Detect celestials, fiends, undead nearby.

features.name: Lay on Hands
features.description: Healing pool of 5 × paladin level HP.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: Adopt a combat specialty.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Cast paladin spells using Charisma.

features.name: Divine Smite
features.description: Expend a spell slot to deal extra radiant damage on a hit.

features.name: Sacred Oath
features.description: Choose your oath (subclass); Channel Divinity; Divine Health.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

features.name: Aura of Protection
features.description: You and nearby allies add your CHA mod to saves.

features.name: Favored Enemy
features.description: Advantage to track and recall info about chosen foes.

features.name: Natural Explorer
features.description: Bonuses while traveling in favored terrain.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: Adopt a combat specialty.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Cast ranger spells using Wisdom.

features.name: Ranger Archetype
features.description: Choose your subclass; Primeval Awareness.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

features.name: Land's Stride
features.description: Move through nonmagical difficult terrain freely.

features.name: Expertise
features.description: Double proficiency on two chosen skills (or one + thieves' tools).

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.description: Extra damage once per turn with advantage or a flanking ally (scales).

features.name: Thieves' Cant
features.description: Secret coded language of rogues.

features.name: Cunning Action
features.description: Bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide.

features.name: Roguish Archetype
features.description: Choose your subclass.

features.name: Uncanny Dodge
features.description: Reaction to halve damage from one attack.

features.name: Evasion
features.description: Take no damage on a successful DEX save (half on fail).

features.name: Reliable Talent
features.description: Treat a d20 of 9 or lower as 10 on proficient checks.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Cast sorcerer spells using Charisma.

features.name: Sorcerous Origin
features.description: Choose your subclass; grants extra features.

features.name: Font of Magic
features.description: Gain sorcery points to fuel your magic.

features.name: Metamagic
features.description: Bend spells with options like Twin, Quicken, Subtle.

features.name: Otherworldly Patron
features.description: Choose your patron (subclass); grants expanded spells and features.

features.name: Pact Magic
features.description: A few spell slots that all rise to your highest level and recharge on a short rest.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.description: Learn fragments of forbidden knowledge that grant lasting magical abilities.

features.name: Pact Boon
features.description: Choose Pact of the Blade, Chain, or Tome.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability by 2 or two abilities by 1 (or take a feat).

features.description: Increase one ability by 2 or two abilities by 1 (or take a feat).

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (6th level)
features.description: Choose one 6th-level spell to cast once per long rest, without a slot.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability by 2 or two abilities by 1 (or take a feat).

features.description: Choose one 7th-level spell to cast once per long rest.

features.description: Increase one ability by 2 or two abilities by 1 (or take a feat).

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability by 2 or two abilities by 1 (or take a feat).
